theory.intro: Per cent means 'per hundred'. A percentage tells you how many parts out of $100$ you have.
facts: $100\%$ is the **whole**; $50\%$ is half; $0\%$ is none.
On a $10 \times 10$ grid ($100$ squares), each shaded square is $1\%$.
steps: Count (or read) how many parts out of $100$.
Write that number with a $\%$ sign.
Compare with the whole: more than $100\%$ is more than one whole.
